title: Codex Session Route Continuity
problem: Codex state-bound remote compaction can lose provider endpoint affinity across helper restarts because session route affinity is runtime-only state.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core responses_compact route_affinity --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: Core target complete. Future work should open a new lane for explicit continuity-domain support before allowing state-bound compact to cross provider endpoints.
